title: 'Aravnah #0728
definition:
Araunah = "I shall shout for joy"
        or "make ye to shine (\\#2Sa 24:16\\)"
        or "joyful shouting of Jah (\\#2Sa 24:18\\)"

 1) a Jebusite who sold David the site for an altar
